message:
style(tests): Apply Clippy lints to E2E and security tests

e2e_render_cycle.rs:
- Replace .filter().collect() + is_empty() with direct .any() check
- More efficient: early-returns on first match instead of collecting

e2e_unicode.rs:
- Replace .map(|g| display_width(g)) with .map(display_width)
- Function reference is cleaner than closure wrapper

security_regression.rs:
- Add backticks around function names in doc comments per convention:
  set_title() -> `set_title()`, escape_url_for_osc8() -> `escape_url_for_osc8()`

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
